metadata.name: ww-input-toggle
metadata.description: A user-friendly toggle switch for enabling or disabling settings, featuring customizable colors and sizes. Renders as a button with a sliding selector that moves between off and on states.
features: Boolean state management with customizable initial value
Customizable selector and background colors for both on and off states
Required field validation for form integration
Custom validation formula support when used inside a form
Does not support labels or text inside the toggle itself

properties.name: value
properties.description: The initial boolean value of the toggle. true for on, false for off.

properties.name: required
properties.description: Whether the toggle field is required in a form context.

properties.name: readonly
properties.description: When true, prevents user interaction with the toggle.

properties.name: selectorSize
properties.description: The size of the toggle selector knob as a percentage (10% to 100%).

properties.name: selectorColorOff
properties.description: The color of the toggle selector knob when the toggle is in the off state.

properties.name: selectorColorOn
properties.description: The color of the toggle selector knob when the toggle is in the on state.

properties.name: backgroundColorOff
properties.description: The background color of the toggle track when the toggle is in the off state.

properties.name: backgroundColorOn
properties.description: The background color of the toggle track when the toggle is in the on state.

properties.name: fieldName
properties.description: The field name used for form integration when the toggle is inside a form container. Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container (sidePanelContent.form?.uid is falsy).

properties.name: customValidation
properties.description: Enable custom validation formula. Only relevant when toggle is inside a form. Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container (sidePanelContent.form?.uid is falsy).

properties.name: validation
properties.description: A formula for custom validation logic. Only used when customValidation is enabled and the toggle is inside a form. Inactive when the element is not in a form container or when customValidation is false.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container (sidePanelContent.form?.uid is falsy) or when customValidation is false.

states.name: readonly
states.description: Applied when the toggle is in read-only mode, preventing user interaction.

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when the user clicks the toggle to change its state.

events.name: initValueChange
events.description: Triggered when the initial value property changes programmatically.

variables.name: value
variables.description: The current boolean state of the toggle. true when on, false when off.

specifications: CRITICAL: Do not forget to add border-radius to the toggle element for a good-looking rounded toggle appearance.
CRITICAL: Do not forget to add colors (selectorColorOff, selectorColorOn, backgroundColorOff, backgroundColorOn) or the toggle will be transparent and invisible to the user.
The toggle inherits its background styling from CSS, so the 'background' style property is ignored in favor of backgroundColorOff and backgroundColorOn properties.
The selector size is a percentage of the toggle height, controlling how large the knob appears relative to the track.
